backgroundHover.description: Added — no dark override existed; light value would barely show on a dark hover surface

text.description: Added to fix a contrast bug: the light-mode text color (#111827) is nearly identical to the dark-mode page background (#111827), making ghost button text invisible in dark mode

gapWithinTrailing.description: From Figma — gap-[8px] between Detail and chevron

backgroundPressed.description: From Figma List item Pressed state — not on the core neutral scale (close to but distinct from neutral.200)

labelFontWeight.description: From Figma — Inter Regular, not Medium

leadingIconBackground.description: Was missing a darkValue entirely — caught during an accessibility audit (the swatch stayed light-gray even in dark mode).

leadingIconColor.description: Added during an accessibility audit — the CSS previously reused the semantic --color-text-muted token (neutral.400/#9ca3af) here, which only reaches 2.31:1 against this swatch's background, failing WCAG's 3:1 non-text contrast minimum for meaningful icons. This dedicated token fixes that (6.87:1 light / 7.0:1 dark) without changing --color-text-muted's intentionally faint look everywhere else it's used.

containerGap.description: Vertical gap between boxed rows — not specified in the inspected Figma frame, using a reasonable default

selectionSize.description: From Figma — 20px checkbox including its 2px padding

trailingIconSize.description: From Figma CaretRight — 14px, no matching entry on the icon sizing scale (sm=16/md=20)

focusRingColor.description: From Figma misc/.Focus ring — #3b82f6, intentionally not the shared --color-border-focus indigo used elsewhere

lineHeight.description: From Figma: 16px at 12px font size (~1.33) — snug (1.375) is the closest scale step

infoText.description: From Figma — distinct from color.info.700 (#1d4ed8) used elsewhere

warning.description: From Figma — not on the core warning scale (warning.100 is yellow, this is orange)

height.description: From Figma — between control.sm (32) and control.md (40)

actionLeadIconSize.description: From Figma Action chip leading icon — 16px

filterLeadIconSize.description: From Figma Filter chip "Leading icon" configuration (node 5173:2924) — 20px, larger than Action chip's icon

paddingFilter.description: Both sides, used by the icon-less Filter chip "Default" configuration

paddingFilterIconLeft.description: From Figma Filter chip "Leading icon" configuration — left padding shrinks to 12px when an icon is present; right stays at paddingFilter (16px)

gapRight.description: Gap between content and image when image=right

gapTop.description: Gap between image and content when image=top

metaGap.description: From Figma gap/xxs (2px) — approximated with the closest scale step

gap.description: Between leading/trailing icon and the value text

border.description: From Figma Field default border — not on the core neutral scale

borderFocus.description: Border stays the hover shade on focus; the focus ring supplies the emphasis

borderErrorFocus.description: From Figma error+focused Field border — distinct from color.error.500/700

focusRingColor.description: From Figma's shared "misc/.Focus ring" component — exact match to color.info.500. Stays blue even in the error+focused state.

focusRingOffset.description: From Figma inset[-3px] — not on the spacing scale

footerErrorColor.description: Inferred to pair with borderError — not independently confirmed in Figma

borderDefault.description: INFERRED — Figma renders Radio as a flattened image asset this session could not decode pixel-for-pixel (network sandbox blocks the asset URL). Chosen to match Chip/Card's neutral border convention; verify visually against Figma.

fillDefault.description: INFERRED — "Type: No emphasis" selected fill, chosen to match ListItem's selectionBackground (neutral.700) convention. Not pixel-verified.

fillEmphasis.description: INFERRED — "Type: Emphasis" selected fill, chosen to match Button/Chip's primary accent convention. Not pixel-verified.

borderError.description: INFERRED by naming convention — not pixel-verified.

fillError.description: INFERRED by naming convention — not pixel-verified.

focusRingColor.description: Confirmed — Radio's Focus state references the same shared "misc/.Focus ring" Figma component as Text field (node 5356:1060).

gap.description: Between text block, checkbox, and button group

titleLineHeight.description: From Figma: 20px/26px (~1.3) — tight (1.25) is the closest scale step

overlayColor.description: Backdrop scrim — not shown in the Figma frame itself (dialog was inspected in isolation); a conventional dark scrim was added since the component needs one to function as a modal.

sizeSmall.description: From Figma — between control.sm (32) and control.md (40)

primaryBackgroundHover.description: From Figma — close to but distinct from color.primary.600 (#32338a)

primaryBackgroundPressed.description: From Figma — close to but distinct from color.primary.700 (#272875)

primaryBackgroundDisabled.description: From Figma — close to but distinct from color.primary.200 (#a9abeb)

elevatedBackgroundHover.description: INFERRED — Hover state wasn't individually fetched for Elevated; chosen to follow the same one-step-darker pattern confirmed for Secondary/Ghost.

ghostIconColorDisabled.description: INFERRED to match Button ghost's disabled treatment (color-only change, no bg/border).

dangerPrimaryBackgroundHover.description: INFERRED — not individually fetched; matches Tailwind red-600, same value confirmed elsewhere in this file as the Text field's error-focused border.

dangerPrimaryBackgroundPressed.description: INFERRED — not individually fetched; follows the same darkening step as Primary.

dangerGhostBackgroundHover.description: INFERRED to pair with Ghost's neutral.100 hover.

headlineColor.description: No darkValue — Toast's own background (informative/danger/success/warning) is a fixed light pastel that never flips with theme (matching this project's precedent that status colors are theme-invariant), so the text sitting on it must also stay invariant to keep contrast; an earlier automated dark-mode pass incorrectly added a darkValue here that flipped this to near-white against a still-light background — caught and reverted during an accessibility contrast audit.

textLineHeight.description: From Figma: 14px/18px (~1.29) — tight (1.25) is the closest scale step

warningBackground.description: From Figma — matches the same literal used by Badge's warning color; not on the core warning scale (warning.100 is yellow, this is orange)

warningBorder.description: From Figma — Tailwind orange-500, distinct from the core warning scale

lineHeight.description: From Figma: 12px/16px (~1.33) — snug (1.375) is the closest scale step

iconSize.description: From Figma Sparkle icon — below the smallest step on the icon scale (sizing.icon.sm is 16px)

category1Background.description: From Figma — same literal used elsewhere for neutral borders (Card, Chip)

category5Background.description: From Figma — same literal as Toast's warningBackground / Badge's warning

category5Text.description: From Figma — Tailwind orange-700, distinct from the core warning scale

padding.description: From Figma — below the smallest step on the spacing scale

borderRadius.description: From Figma — between sm (4) and lg (12), not an exact scale step

segmentPaddingX.description: From Figma — not on the spacing scale

segmentPaddingY.description: From Figma — not on the spacing scale

textColorSelected.description: From Figma — literal black, distinct from neutral.900 (#111827)

thumbBorderRadius.description: From Figma — not on the border-radius scale

thumbShadow.description: From Figma — a bespoke shadow, distinct from the core elevation scale

separatorColor.description: INFERRED — Figma shows an "opacity-30" separator with no explicit base color in the inspected node; a neutral 30%-opacity line was used to approximate it.

borderHoverFilled.description: From Figma — when the field already has a value, the hover border darkens further than Text field's neutral.300 hover

footerErrorColor.description: From Figma — confirmed directly, distinct from Text field's inferred error.700 footer color

clearIconSize.description: From Figma XCircle clear icon, shown while typing

contentPadding.description: Used when Padding content=Default; Padding content=None renders 0

titleLineHeight.description: From Figma: 16px/20px — exact match to tight (1.25)

subtitleLineHeight.description: From Figma: 14px/18px (~1.29) — tight (1.25) is the closest scale step

dividerDotSize.description: From Figma — below the smallest icon-scale step

height.description: From Figma — fixed height, unlike Text field's content-driven height

menuShadow.description: INFERRED — matches the core elevation.lg value; the open-menu drop shadow wasn't individually inspected in Figma

footerErrorColor.description: From Figma — confirmed directly, distinct from Text field's inferred error.700 footer color

background.description: From Figma — a translucent (backdrop-blur) surface; the blur itself isn't tokenized, just the base color

expandedHeadingFontSize.description: From Figma — not on the core type scale (between xl/24 and 5xl/48)

expandedHeadingLineHeight.description: From Figma: 34px/44px (~1.29) — tight (1.25) is the closest scale step

progressBarPaddingX.description: From Figma node 6742:459 ("Top app bar - iOS", Hierarchy Level 2 with progress bar)

borderRadiusTail.description: 4px — the corner nearest the tail, per Figma (tail=Bottom pairs with a squared bottom-right corner, tail=Top with a squared top-right corner)

lineHeight.description: From Figma: 14px/18px (~1.29) — tight (1.25) is the closest scale step

assistantBackground.description: ADDED — Figma's "Chat bubble" component only defines a Sender=User variant (confirmed via get_design_context on node 7451:2419). A two-party chat needs an assistant/received style too, so one was added to mirror the User bubble's shape with a plain white fill and the same neutral border used elsewhere (Card/Chip's #dfe2e7), rendered on the opposite (left) side with the tail corner mirrored.

minHeight.description: From Figma — between control.lg (48) and control.xl (56), not an exact scale step. Used as min-height rather than a fixed height so multi-line growth stays possible.

lineHeight.description: From Figma: 16px/20px — exact match to tight (1.25)

border.description: From Figma Field default border — matches Text field's convention

borderFocus.description: Border stays the hover shade on focus; the focus ring supplies the emphasis — same convention as Text field

focusRingColor.description: From Figma's shared "misc/.Focus ring" component — same as Text field/Radio

sendButtonSize.description: From Figma Icon Button — 8px padding + 2px inner padding + 16px icon on each side, matching IconButton's small size (36px)

sendButtonBackgroundDisabled.description: From Figma — same literal as IconButton's primaryBackgroundDisabled

dotColor.description: INFERRED — Figma's "ChatAnswerLoading" renders each of its 3 animation frames as flattened image-asset ellipses (network sandbox blocks fetching the Figma CDN asset URLs to sample exact pixel colors). The 3 frames cycle which dot is "lit" vs. dim, so this was rebuilt as a standard CSS keyframe typing-indicator animation using a single neutral dot color at varying opacity rather than 3 separate static image frames.

animationDuration.description: Not a Figma value (Figma shows static animation frames, not timing) — a conventional typing-indicator cadence

paddingXs.description: From Figma — below the smallest spacing-scale step

footerPaddingTop.description: From Figma — below the smallest spacing-scale step

backgroundPressed.description: From Figma — same literal as IconButton's primaryBackgroundPressed

backgroundDisabled.description: From Figma — same literal as IconButton's primaryBackgroundDisabled

background.description: From Figma — background shown behind Illustration/Icon types and the empty-image fallback

borderRadius.description: Not explicitly specified in the inspected frame (the placeholder examples are edge-to-edge); a small radius was added so the component reads as a discrete element when used standalone — INFERRED

iconColor.description: INFERRED — Figma's Illustration/Icon fallback is a literal isometric-cube illustration rendered as nested vector paths (dozens of rotated line segments), not a reusable icon asset, and its source image is only available via a temporary (7-day) Figma CDN URL. Rebuilt as a simple generic placeholder glyph in the component instead; consumers can override via the `icon` prop.

iconSize.description: INFERRED approximation of Figma's 86px literal cube illustration, scaled down for a simpler generic glyph

overlayBackground.description: From Figma Video - Overlay type — bg-primary.500 at 75% opacity

playIconSizeLarge.description: From Figma — 1:1 overlay play glyph is larger

paddingX.description: From Figma — not on the spacing scale

paddingY.description: From Figma — not on the spacing scale

borderSelected.description: From Figma's Selected state (sampled on the Android/Selected variant) — the Default state (sampled on iOS/Default) has no border. Figma names this axis by platform, but the only real visual difference observed between the two sampled variants was Default (no border, regular weight) vs. Selected (border + medium weight), not iOS vs. Android — so this was unified into one platform-agnostic `selected` state rather than forked by platform, consistent with how Radio/Dialog/TopAppBar's platform variants were handled.

paddingTop.description: From Figma — not on the spacing scale

lineHeight.description: From Figma: 14px/18px (~1.29) — tight (1.25) is the closest scale step

textColorDanger.description: From Figma — exact match to color.error.500

borderRadiusTop.description: From Figma — not on the border-radius scale

grabberPaddingTop.description: From Figma — not on the spacing scale

grabberPaddingBottom.description: From Figma — not on the spacing scale

labelLineHeight.description: From Figma: 12px/16px (~1.33) — snug (1.375) is the closest scale step

labelColorSelected.description: From Figma — same literal as IconButton's primaryBackgroundPressed

homeIndicatorPaddingTop.description: From Figma — not on the spacing scale. Distinct from Button Group's confirmed 12px top padding for the same iOS home-indicator element; this frame's own value was used rather than reusing Button Group's.

homeIndicatorBarWidth.description: INFERRED — reused Button Group's confirmed iOS home-indicator bar dimensions; this frame didn't expand the bar's own sub-layer.
